name: Can I get paid if exposure was from defective masks at work?
description: Yes, third-party suit against maker; keep the gear.

mainEntity.name: Can I get paid if exposure was from defective masks at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, third-party suit against maker; keep the gear.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Yes, sue manufacturer separately from comp for product liability.** Employers provide PPE, but defects create third-party claims[1]. Key factors: Prove mask failed (tests, recalls); exposure despite use. No worker fault bar. Utah products liability 4 years. Preserve masks, test independently. Dual recovery possible.
